Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Response To Third-Party Subpoena
Off Calendar Nov-01-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom):

Matthew R. Carter, Esq., of WINSTON & STRAWN LLP, (312) 558-5600, for Plaintiff.

William J. Frimel, Esq., of Seubert French Frimel & Warner LLP, (650) 322-3048, for Non-Party Glassdoor Inc.

No other appearances.

RE: Plaintiff PREMISE DATA CORPORATION's Motion To Compel Response To Third-Party Subpoena.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions regarding the court's tentative ruling on Plaintiff's Motion to Compel. At conclusion of argument, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Robert Woods. Court Reporter: David Salyer, CSR: 4410, T: (323) 497-1441; E: davesal55@gmail.com. (302/RBU)

***After hearing, an order is signed.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Response To Third-Party Subpoena
Off Calendar Oct-18-2023 Continued To Nov-01-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Matt Carter, Esq. of , Tel. for Plaintiff Premise Data Corporation;
Chris Edgar, Esq. of , Tel., for Non-Party Glass Door.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF PREMISE DATA CORPORATION'S Motion To Compel Response To Third-Party Subpoena.

Plaintiff Premise Data Corporation DOES NOT stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge.

Argument is held.

At the conclusion of argument, the motion is continued to November 1, 2023, at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, on the Law & Motion calendar.

Judge Pro Tem Cohen is to prepare a report and recommendation.

Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Court Reporter: Teckla Pratt, CSR #13125, Tel. 310.490.4905, Email: tecklapratt@gmail.com. Bailiff: Not Present. (JPT/302)
